name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine + Skill Runtime. v0.2.0-beta (sprint 0 P2 acceptance): 14 subsystems, 99/99 tests, 0 flakes; MT-2 atomic-write retry-on-EPERM patch lands.
